Dealt to GibGibGib [Ah Qd]
*** PRE-FLOP ***

Snootyfox1 folds

Hyuga_Kojiro folds
VeKrAm calls 0.03€
*** FLOP *** [As 9d Jc]
VeKrAm checks
GibGibGib bets 0.08€
VeKrAm calls 0.08€

VeKrAm checks
GibGibGib bets 0.40€ and is all-in
